content:
Your resume is well-organized, with a strong skills section. However, your objective statement could be a bit more focused—right now, it’s broad and could be more tailored to the specific job you’re applying for. Additionally, your work experience section would benefit from more detailed bullet points that emphasize achievements rather than just responsibilities. Including measurable results, such as improvements you contributed to in past roles, would make your resume stand out more.

With these small adjustments, your application will be even stronger. Keep up the great work!

Best,
Professor Padavano

Grades:
• Cover Letter: 80/100
• Resume: 85/100

⸻

Letter for Allanys Velez

Dear Allanys,

Thank you for submitting your resume and cover letter. You’ve put together a strong application, and I appreciate the effort you’ve put into your materials. Below is my feedback.
context: From document: Feedback Letters for Resume & Cover Letters — chunk 15 (chunk 15/22)
